UpdateSslVpnServer.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string up to 64 characters, see [ClientToken Idempotency](https://cloud.baidu.com/doc/VPC/s/gjwvyu77i/).
UpdateSslVpnServer.sslVpnServerId: The ID of the SSL-VPN server
UpdateSslVpnServer.sslVpnServerName: SSL-VPN server instance name; supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, and special characters -_/.; must start with a letter; length 1–65
